results.name: POCL Progressive Overload Curriculum

results.name: Self-Evolution Knowledge Distillation COLING 2025
results.rationale: Self-evolution KD kw>=2 forces hit; aligns with madya self-distillation axis but no grade-unlock + no stance-distribution gating.

decision_rationale: All 8 results meet kw>=2 forced-hit threshold via overlap on 'self-distillation' and 'curriculum' substrings; per the mechanical kw>=2 rule, total_hits = 8 -> FAIL. Note: verifier-judge sem/func scores 0.35-0.55 are all sub-threshold, so semantic/functional channels would alone yield PASS; mechanical kw rule wins per FROZEN step-10.
